perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a green t-shirt stands against a plain white background, speaking energetically and gesturing with his right hand. (2) He crosses his arms in an 'X' shape to signal 'Incorrect' as large text appears over him. (3) A detailed cross-section diagram of a smartphone screen appears, showing different coating layers like 'AR' and 'AF' along with an 'imos' screen protector. (4) The man continues his explanation, using various hand gestures like pointing, moving his hands to show layers, and making an 'OK' sign.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks in Mandarin with a high-pitched, enthusiastic, and fast-paced tone. The vocal density is very high as he addresses rumors. (2) A faint, upbeat background music track plays throughout the explanation. (3) The audio environment is very clean, sounding like a studio recording with minimal ambient noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: 'iPhone 17 因為有 七層抗反射鍍膜 所以貼保貼 會把它破壞掉 真的嗎?' (Is it true that iPhone 17's 7-layer anti-reflection coating will be ruined by a screen protector?) - Curious/Hooking tone. (2) Answer text: '答案 錯' (Answer: Wrong) - Authoritative/Corrective tone. (3) Functional text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese reflecting the speech. (4) Technical labels on diagram: 'imos 側邊貼', 'AF抗指紋', 'AR抗反射', 'Silicone 膠'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Rumor Debunking -> Technical Explanation with Diagram -> Final Advice

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) present throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian man, wearing glasses, a grey newsboy cap, a green 'Roots Athletics' t-shirt, and a yellow wristwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, well-lit white wall with social media handles (3c有意思tim哥, 3ctim) displayed in the top left corner.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to debunk a viral rumor regarding the iPhone 17's screen coating. The creator uses a technical diagram to explain that applying a screen protector (specifically from the imos brand) will not damage the phone's AR and AF coatings because of the specific adhesive types and layer structure used, thereby educating consumers and promoting a product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator uses a specific brand's diagram (imos) and explains why their adhesive (Silicone) is superior to others (OCA), directly endorsing the product's safety for new devices.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim's energetic delivery, newsboy cap, and technical myth-busting style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets tech-savvy consumers and Apple enthusiasts, utilizing clear visual aids to simplify complex manufacturing details into consumer-friendly advice.
